ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the administrator managing the session (nullable) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user associated with the session */,
  "socket_id" TEXT /* Unique socket identifier for real-time communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was last updated */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity in the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'moderator', 'user') */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the admin account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the admin account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., 'super_admin', 'admin') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socket_connections" (
  "socket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the socket connection */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user associated with the socket connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the socket connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the socket connection was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the socket connection is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socket_connections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session associated with the log */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity logged (e.g., 'created', 'updated') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logged activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions_analytics" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user associated with the analytics */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions for the user */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of sessions for the user in seconds */,
  "last_session_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last session */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent by the user in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_performance_metrics" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session associated with the metrics */,
  "load_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to load the session in milliseconds */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time for the session in milliseconds */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate for the session as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session associated with the log */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of security activity logged (e.g., 'login', 'logout') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logged activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_audit_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
